persona_context: CTO: Analytical, skeptical of unproven technology, focused on scalability.
challenge_question: How can you ensure that your cybersecurity solution will scale effectively as our company grows, especially given the increasing complexity of cyber threats?
deck_evidence: Slide #7, Title: "Scalability and Future-Proofing", Data points: "Our platform is built on a microservices architecture, allowing for seamless scaling. We have successfully tested our solution with up to 10,000 concurrent users, and our AI-driven threat detection adapts in real-time to new threats."
ideal_answer: Our platform's microservices architecture is designed to handle growth efficiently, allowing us to scale horizontally as your user base expands. The successful testing with 10,000 concurrent users demonstrates our capability to manage high loads. Additionally, our AI-driven threat detection continuously learns and adapts to new threats, ensuring that as your company grows and the threat landscape evolves, our solution remains robust and effective.

persona_context: CTO: Analytical, focused on scalability and technical feasibility.
challenge_question: How do you plan to ensure the scalability of your platform as you onboard more users, especially given the limited resources typical at the Seed stage?

- Microservices-based architecture

This approach ensures that we can efficiently scale as we grow, even with the resource constraints typical at the Seed stage.
